attractions.name: Kennedy Space Center
attractions.summary: Kennedy Space Center is one of the more recognizable historic sites in Orlando and usually adds the most value when visitors want stronger context, not just a quick pass-through.
attractions.heroTitle: Kennedy Space Center guide, things to do, and local tours
